name: video-editor-tool-fixes-8-20260325-1537
idea: Video editor tool fixes: 8 issues covering drag-drop unification (type mismatch indicators, internal/external drag consistency, drop zones), pane locking view shifts, broken Remotion render, text option filtering for non-text assets, and double-click lightbox

overrides.note: USER DECISION: T7 (render) must NOT just disable the button. Instead, implement actual client-side rendering using @remotion/webcodecs (browser-based WebCodecs API). The announcement-video repo uses @remotion/renderer via CLI (npx remotion render) but that's Node.js only. For browser, use @remotion/webcodecs which renders Remotion compositions in-browser. The existing startRender stub, renderStatus, renderProgress state in useTimelineData.ts is already wired. Implementation: install @remotion/webcodecs, implement startRender to call renderMedia equivalent, show progress, produce blob, trigger download. T6 (pane shift): must follow the EXACT existing pattern from LayoutMainContent.tsx which uses marginLeft/marginRight with transition-[margin,padding] duration-300 ease-smooth based on isShotsPaneLocked/isTasksPaneLocked and their widths from PanesContext.

overrides.reason: T7 scope change: user requires actual client-side Remotion rendering via @remotion/webcodecs, not just disabling the button. T6 scope clarification: must follow existing LayoutMainContent.tsx pattern with marginLeft/marginRight transitions.

notes.note: USER DECISION: T7 (render) must NOT just disable the button. Instead, implement actual client-side rendering using @remotion/webcodecs (browser-based WebCodecs API). The announcement-video repo uses @remotion/renderer via CLI (npx remotion render) but that's Node.js only. For browser, use @remotion/webcodecs which renders Remotion compositions in-browser. The existing startRender stub, renderStatus, renderProgress state in useTimelineData.ts is already wired. Implementation: install @remotion/webcodecs, implement startRender to call renderMedia equivalent, show progress, produce blob, trigger download. T6 (pane shift): must follow the EXACT existing pattern from LayoutMainContent.tsx which uses marginLeft/marginRight with transition-[margin,padding] duration-300 ease-smooth based on isShotsPaneLocked/isTasksPaneLocked and their widths from PanesContext.
See the add-note override for full details on both decisions.

last_gate.rationale: Score stabilized at 2.0 across iterations 2→3, plan delta dropped from 67.9% to 26.0% showing convergence, 8 flags resolved, and the single remaining flag (PaneControlTab offset removal) is an executor-level detail. The plan already notes "Verify PaneControlTab still positions its tab correctly; it may need its own margin adjustment or can use the pane's bounding rect" — the executor has the context to handle this. Further iteration would be diminishing returns.
last_gate.signals_assessment: Score trajectory 9.0 → 2.0 → 2.0 shows stable convergence. Plan delta decreased from 67.9% to 26.0%, confirming the plan is settling. Zero recurring critiques across 3 iterations. 8 total flags resolved. The single open flag (pane-control-tab-offset-removal) is a localized CSS/positioning detail within Step 6 that the executor can resolve by inspecting PaneControlTab and TopPaneStrategy during implementation. Preflight clean on all checks.
warnings: Step 6: Do NOT blindly remove horizontalOffset from PaneControlTab. The control tab is a separate fixed element that won't move with the pane's margin changes. Either keep horizontalOffset for the tab, or apply matching margin-based centering to the tab element. Inspect PaneControlTab.tsx:91,136 and TopPaneStrategy.ts:7-15 before removing.

settled_decisions.decision: Step 7 implements client-side rendering via @remotion/webcodecs. User explicitly overrode the prior 'disable button' decision.
settled_decisions.rationale: User notes clearly state this is non-negotiable. Existing render state machinery (renderStatus, renderProgress, etc.) is already wired — only startRender needs implementation.

settled_decisions.decision: Step 6 uses marginLeft/marginRight with transition-[margin,padding] duration-300 ease-smooth, matching LayoutMainContent.tsx exactly.
settled_decisions.rationale: User explicitly required following the exact existing pattern.

settled_decisions.decision: Asset-kind during dragover uses type-key encoding (e.g., setData('asset-kind:audio', '')) to expose kind in the types list.
settled_decisions.rationale: Settled across iterations 1-3. Standard workaround for DataTransfer API limitation.

settled_decisions.decision: Two drag systems (pointer internal, HTML5 external) remain separate; only visual indicators are unified via shared CSS classes.
settled_decisions.rationale: Merging mechanisms would require replacing the timeline library's pointer system — out of scope.

settled_decisions.decision: The PaneControlTab horizontal offset concern (flag pane-control-tab-offset-removal) is an executor-level detail. The executor must verify tab alignment after switching to margins and preserve or adapt the offset as needed.
settled_decisions.rationale: The plan already contains a verification note. The fix is localized to Step 6 and discoverable during implementation by inspecting PaneControlTab.tsx and TopPaneStrategy.ts.

last_gate.orchestrator_guidance: Plan passed gate and preflight. Proceed to finalize. Verify unresolved flags against the plan and project code before accepting.
